source: SI CONIURA compare(existing, "") != 0

stmt: SI rituale: codegen_normalize_string_literal depth: 19 line: 46
source: SI n >= 2 ET CONIURA char_at(raw_text, 0) == quote ET CONIURA char_at(raw_text, n - 1) == quote

stmt: ALITER rituale: codegen_normalize_string_literal depth: 19 line: 53
source: SI next == 34

stmt: DUM rituale: codegen_normalize_string_literal depth: 19 line: 49
source: DUM i < n - 1

stmt: EVOCA rituale: codegen_normalize_string_literal depth: 19 line: 44
source: EVOCA REX n AD CONIURA len(raw_text)
